mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS reply_id, r.content, r.post_id, r.user_id, r.create_time, u.username, u.role AS user_role FROM reply r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
SELECT r.id AS reply_id, r.content, r.post_id, r.user_id, r.create_time, u.username, u.role AS user_role FROM reply r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id AS reply_id, r.post_id, r.user_id, r.content, r.create_time, u.username, u.role AS user_role FROM reply r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply (post_id, user_id, content, create_time, parent_reply_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), #{parentReplyId})
mapper.update:
UPDATE reply
content = #{content},
parent_reply_id = #{parentReplyId},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE user_id = #{userId}
